creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 257690
patch including moving to botan 3

Hi,

I am uploading a slightly revised patch moving to botan3, already supported upstream. Botan2, on which port depends at present has been marked deprecated and will be removed.

BTW, at this point I think we need to really evaluate updating the port even if this causes incompatibilities with USB support, since fixing that is outside of the port control.

Keeping the port back indefinitely does not look like a good solution long term.
